1.title: API timeout errors in production
1.description: Getting 504 timeout errors when calling /api/v1/runs endpoint. This happens intermittently, about 20% of requests. Started happening after we scaled to 1000+ runs per day.

2.title: Authentication issues with OIDC SSO
2.description: Users are unable to log in via corporate SSO. Getting 'invalid_grant' error from the OAuth provider. Affects entire engineering team.

3.title: Traces not showing up in UI
3.description: Trace data is being logged successfully (I can see it in the API response) but it's not visible in the web interface. Using weave.trace() decorator as documented.

4.title: Need help with custom evaluation metrics
4.description: How do I log custom evaluation metrics to Weave? I want to track BLEU score and ROUGE score for my LLM outputs. Documentation shows basic examples but not custom scorers.

5.title: Dataset upload failing for large files
5.description: Large dataset uploads (>500MB) are timing out after 5 minutes. Tried both weave.publish() and the web UI. Smaller datasets work fine.

6.title: Model versioning not working as expected
6.description: When I update my model and publish a new version, the old version still shows as 'latest' in the UI. weave.publish() completes successfully but version tags don't update.

7.title: Slack integration not sending notifications
7.description: Configured Slack webhook for evaluation alerts but no notifications are being sent. Webhook URL is correct and works when tested manually via curl.

8.title: Dashboard loading very slowly
8.description: Project dashboard takes 30+ seconds to load. We have about 10k runs logged over the past month. Is there a way to optimize or archive old runs?

9.title: Cannot export evaluation results to CSV
9.description: Export button on evaluation results page returns 500 error. Need to share results with stakeholders who don't have W&B access.

10.title: Python SDK version compatibility issue
10.description: Getting import error with weave 0.51.0 and Python 3.13. Error message: 'module has no attribute TypedDict'. Works fine with Python 3.11.

11.title: Cost tracking not accurate for Claude models
11.description: Cost tracking shows $0.00 for all Claude API calls. OpenAI costs are tracked correctly. Using Anthropic's official API with proper pricing tier.

12.title: Documentation outdated for TypeScript SDK
12.description: TypeScript SDK documentation shows v2.x examples but latest package is v4.x. Many APIs have changed and examples don't work.

13.title: How to enable PII redaction for logs
13.description: Need to enable automatic PII redaction for logged prompts and completions. We're handling customer data and need GDPR compliance.

14.title: Team member cannot access shared project
14.description: Added new team member with editor role but they get 403 error when accessing the project. Other team members can access fine. Tried removing and re-adding permissions.

15.title: Evaluation comparison view showing incorrect diff
15.description: When comparing two evaluation runs, the diff highlighting is reversed - showing improvements as regressions and vice versa. Happens only for custom metrics, not built-in ones.
